ns0:entry.ns0:title: BornToBeRoot/NETworkManager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BornToBeRoot/NETworkManager
Language: c%23
A powerful tool for managing networks and troubleshoot network problems!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cleanuparr/Cleanuparr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cleanuparr/Cleanuparr
Language: c%23
Cleanuparr is a tool for automating the cleanup of unwanted or blocked files in Sonarr, Radarr, and supported download clients like qBittorrent, Deluge and Transmission.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IAmParadox27/jellyfin-plugin-file-transformation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IAmParadox27/jellyfin-plugin-file-transformation
Language: c%23
Jellyfin plugin that allows other plugins to manipulate the content served by jellyfin-web without modifying the web source directly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IAmParadox27/jellyfin-plugin-home-sections
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IAmParadox27/jellyfin-plugin-home-sections
Language: c%23
Add server provided home sections to your Jellyfin instance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI-powered bridge connecting LLMs and advanced AI agents to the Unity Editor via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Chat with AI to generate code, debug errors, and automate game development tasks directly within your project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantConnect/Lean
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShareX/ShareX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShareX/ShareX
Language: c%23
ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abpframework/abp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abpframework/abp
Language: c%23
Open-source web application framework for ASP.NET Core! Offers an opinionated architecture to build enterprise software solutions with best practices on top of the .NET. Provides the fundamental infrastructure, cross-cutting-concern implementations, startup templates, application modules, UI themes, tooling and documentation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: intro-skipper/intro-skipper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/intro-skipper/intro-skipper
Language: c%23
Automatically detect and skip intro/credit sequences in Jellyfin

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
Language: c%23
The official C# SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with Microsoft.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: space-wizards/space-station-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/space-wizards/space-station-14
Language: c%23
A multiplayer game about paranoia and chaos on a space station. Remake of the cult-classic Space Station 13.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thomhurst/TUnit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thomhurst/TUnit
Language: c%23
A modern, fast and flexible .NET testing framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
Language: c%23
Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system helping you deliver delightful digital experiences.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: win4r/AISuperDomain
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/win4r/AISuperDomain
Language: c%23
Aila(AI超元域): The premier AI integration tool for Windows, macOS, and Android. Ask once, get answers from 10+ AIs like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude3, Copilot, Poe, perplexity and more. Features customizable AI and prompts.
